summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a peak‑performance set, highlighted by an outstanding Morning Dew.
review: Fans rave about the immaculate, super‑crisp recording that showcases virtually no distortion, especially on Phil’s thundering bass. The show is described as a great sequence of tunes at the band’s performance peak, with Morning Dew singled out as a standout moment.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews give 5‑star ratings, praising both the flawless recording quality and the high‑level musical performance; the consistency across multiple detailed comments yields a near‑perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call it "super crispy", "cleanest recording yet" and note almost no distortion, especially on the bass.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a great sequence of tunes that keeps giving, with the overall set considered at the peak of the band's performance.

band_member_comments.Phil: Almost no distortion on his thundering bass lines; highlighted for clarity and power.
